Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANTS OUTCO, INC. AND DAVID HOPPER'S Motion To Dismiss Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings And Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Grant as unopposed.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Dep. Calhoun. Not reported. (302/CK)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT OUTCO, INC. AND DAVID HOPPER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Outco, Inc. and David Hopper's "motion to vacate defaults" is granted. The motion is timely, and the facts could be viewed as any of mistake, inadvertence, surprise and/or excusable neglect. "[B]ecause the law strongly favors trial and disposition on the merits, any doubts in applying [CCP] section 473 must be resolved in favor of the party seeking relief from default." (Maynard v. Brandon (2005) 36 Cal.4th 364, 371-72.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
